chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1060 of 2017 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.7370/2017 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 01-11-2022 Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioners. It appears that on the previous date of hearing, brief was held on behalf of learned Counsel for the petitioners. It further appears that question of maintainability, as noted by this Court vide order dated 27-01-2021, has not been addressed. The petitioners, through instant petition, have impugned the order dated 16-02-2017 passed by the Additional Deputy Commissioner-I, Ghotki at Mirpur Mathelo in respect of subject agricultural land. Against that order, the petitioners have appropriate remedy under Revenue hierarchy; hence, this petition being not maintainable is dismissed accordingly along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
